form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track on March 15 over 1400m, 10 len behind Success Day carrying 53.5kg at $2.90. The race before that came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on March 1 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind High Gold Bar carrying 53kg at $8.20. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.
